generated_oml:
instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Manufacturing environment for MABI MAX 100 robot operation"
    base:contains BaseVerticalAxis, RotationalJoints, EndEffector
]

instance BaseVerticalAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vertical axis component of MABI MAX 100 robot base"
]

instance RotationalJoints : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Rotational joints in MABI MAX 100 robot arm"
]

instance EndEffector : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "End-effector component of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MABIMAX100Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensing component of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MABIMAX100SensorData
]

instance MABIMAX100SensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MABIMAX100Sensor
    base:desc "Time series sensor data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MABIMAX100SensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol implementation for data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

    base:desc "Service for transmitting sensor data via MQTT"

]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight related to data transmission status"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system includes active components that interpret and process data from a passive digital shadow, which operates via a one-way data flow. The digital shadow reference model (Fig. 1) is structured as a UML class diagram defining manufacturing-specific concepts, where the DT serves as the active component responsible for data processing."
]

]
